biological_replicate: CoImmunoPrecipitation (CoIP) of FLAG-tagged subunits of the R2TP/PFDL complex were performed in HeLa cells
experimental_design: TAP-MS was performed on all three subunits
factor_value: ZNHIT2 is a cofactor of R2TP/PFDL that targets the U5 snRNP
number_of_fractions: study purified complexes in solution from various cell fractions
